offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 expense reports/month, inaccurate expense reporting causes financial discrepancies. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate expense reporting leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Join forums where accounting firms share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for exceptions and discrepancies
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
